_comment: Canonical Event entities (Release 1.3 implementation). Each merges all evidence for one event into a single record. Fields are populated ONLY from verified data; empty fields are hidden on the page. 'materials' notes whether a real deck/recording exists in the private content/ store — those files are NOT published (staged-for-review); the page links only to already-public records (publication, project, news). 'state' governs the narrative page (approved-public = build from verified data).

events.title: Institutional Co-Lead, Rinn Artificial Intelligence at MTU
events.summary: Appointment as Institutional Co-Lead at MTU for Rinn Artificial Intelligence, the national Research Ireland AI centre, with roles as Deputy Theme Lead (Inclusive Language Model & Translation Methods) and Principal Investigator.
events.why: A national research-centre leadership role placing MTU and inclusive multilingual AI within Ireland's national AI programme.
events.contribution: Institutional leadership and theme co-direction in inclusive language models and translation methods.

events.title: Keynote — “The Language of Life”, Hologenomic Data Analysis Symposium
events.summary: Keynote on the use of large language models to decode biological data, delivered at an international hologenomics symposium in Brazil.
events.why: An international keynote connecting NLP and genomics — a distinctive cross-disciplinary research line.
events.contribution: Framed genomic foundation models as a 'language of life' for biological sequence understanding.

events.title: Invited talk — “The Language of Life”, Wuhan University
events.summary: Invited presentation extending the 'Language of Life' research line on large language models for biological data, delivered at Wuhan University.
events.why: International reach of the genomics-and-language research programme beyond Europe.
events.contribution: Advanced the genomic foundation-model agenda to an international audience.
events.review_note: Venue/date taken from the repository presentation folder; confirm exact date and host department.

events.title: European patent — On-Air Split Federated Learning with Positive Labels
events.summary: Patent WO/2024/227944 (filed 11 July 2024; inventors Praveen Joshi, Ted Scully, Haithem Afli) on privacy-preserving distributed learning.
events.why: Translation of trustworthy-AI research into protected intellectual property.
events.contribution: A split/federated learning method with positive labels for resource-constrained, privacy-sensitive settings.

events.title: Principal Investigator & MTU Lead, ADAPT Centre
events.summary: Principal Investigator and MTU institutional lead within the national ADAPT Centre for AI-driven digital content technology.
events.why: Institutional leadership in a national research centre.
events.contribution: Leads MTU's contribution to ADAPT's human-centred AI and language technology research.

events.title: Founder & Chair — PoliticalNLP workshop series
events.summary: Founded and chaired the Workshop on Natural Language Processing for Political Sciences (PoliticalNLP), held at LREC 2022 and LREC-COLING 2024.
events.why: International research leadership through a recurring venue bridging NLP with governance and policy.
events.contribution: General Chair and proceedings editor across editions.

events.title: Media coverage — “Ireland at AI ‘crossroads’”, Cork Independent
events.summary: Featured interview (8 May 2025, by Michael Olney) on Ireland's opportunity to lead in ethical, human-centred AI, AI literacy, inclusion and precision medicine.
events.why: National media visibility for the human-centred AI agenda.
events.contribution: Public articulation of a human-centred, inclusive vision for AI in Ireland.

events.title: Findings of EMNLP 2025 — GASE and sign-language translation evaluation
events.summary: Two Findings of EMNLP 2025 papers: generatively augmented sentence encoding (GASE), and rethinking sign-language translation evaluation under signer dependence.
events.why: Peer-reviewed papers at *ACL venues in evaluation science and multilingual AI.
events.contribution: New methods for sentence encoding and for fairer evaluation of sign-language translation.

events.title: EACL 2026 — PTEB: robust text-embedding evaluation
events.summary: Long paper on robust text-embedding evaluation via stochastic paraphrasing at evaluation time with LLMs.
events.contribution: A more robust protocol for evaluating text embeddings using LLM paraphrasing.

events.title: IWSLT 2026 — robust cascaded speech translation (ADAPT–MTU HAI)
events.summary: Shared-task system for robust cascaded speech translation for Bhojpuri–Hindi and Irish–English.
events.why: Ongoing leadership in low-resource speech translation.
events.contribution: A robust cascaded speech-translation pipeline for low-resource language pairs.

events.title: GenDAI — Horizon Europe project (Beneficiary)
events.summary: Horizon Europe project on generative and data-driven AI for diagnostics and health; Dr Afli a beneficiary at MTU.
events.why: Current EU project extending AI-for-health research.
events.contribution: MTU contribution to generative/data-driven AI for health diagnostics.

events.title: ITFLOWS — Horizon 2020 project (Beneficiary)
events.summary: EU Horizon 2020 project applying NLP and analytics to migration flows and public attitudes; Dr Afli a beneficiary and work-package contributor.
events.why: First major EU consortium role; produced political-NLP datasets and deliverables.
events.contribution: NLP and social-media analysis for understanding migration and public attitudes.

events.title: adaptNMT & adaptMLLM — open-source multilingual MT tooling
events.summary: Open-source, language-agnostic environments for training and fine-tuning (multilingual) neural machine translation on low-resource languages such as Irish.
events.why: Widely usable open-source tooling for inclusive translation research.
events.contribution: Accessible training/fine-tuning environments lowering the barrier to low-resource MT.

events.title: Founding of the Human-Centred AI Research Group, MTU
events.summary: Founded and leads the Human-Centred AI (HAI) Research Group at MTU, now hosting doctoral, postdoctoral and international members.
events.why: Created the institutional home for the research programme.
events.contribution: Established a research group focused on multilingual, culturally aware and trustworthy AI.

events.title: ArabicNLP 2025 — winning PalmX system for Arabic cultural QA
events.host: Third Arabic Natural Language Processing Conference
events.summary: Dual-expert and parameter-efficient LLM fine-tuning for Arabic Islamic inheritance reasoning (QIAS) and the winning PalmX system for Arabic cultural QA.
events.contribution: Fine-tuning methods for culturally grounded Arabic question answering.
